headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: - 12.4 Subcontractor agrees to turn the Subcontract Work over to Contractor in good condition and free and  clear  from  all  claims,  encumbrances  and  liens  for  labor,  services,  equipment  or  materials.  In  the  event  that Subcontractor, during the progress of the Subcontract Work or at any time thereafter, fails to pay for labor, services, equipment and/or materials used or purchased for use in connection with the prosecution of the Subcontract Work, Contractor  may  at  its  option  and  without  notice  to  Subcontractor,  pay  all  such  claims  and  charge  the  amounts thereof  to  Subcontractor,  and  Contractor  shall  have  the  right  to  offset  such  amounts  against  payments  then  or thereafter due Subcontractor under this Subcontract or under any other agreement. In the event suit is filed by any person, firm or corporation asserting a claim or lien for labor, services, equipment or materials used or purchased
